positive: A majestic, stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) in a dynamic, meditative pose, rendered in a neo-traditional Japanese woodblock print style. The silhouette should be sharp and elegant against a detailed background of crescent moons, swirling nebulae, and stylized chrysanthemums. Use high contrast color blocking with a limited palette of deep indigo, burnt sienna, gold leaf accents, and ivory white. The composition must be centralized and symmetrical, optimized for wearable apparel art. Intricate linework, clean edges, graphic novel quality, mystical, ethereal.
negative: low quality, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, jpeg artifacts, signature, realistic photo, gore
